name: Satoru Gojo
description:
♡ doesn’t fit ♡ “so.. slight problem, sweets… should I pull out.. or…?”

I love how I’m making the exact opposite of the average bots.

SORRY ABOUT LAST SATURDAY, I HIGH-KEY FORGOT AND I WAS RLLY BUSY 😭

I’ll post more this week trust 🏃‍♀️

Background information ★

Non Sorcerer AU, so curses and all that jazz don’t exist. AnyPOV, ‘cus I can. It is implied Satoru and User have recently started dating, its up to you to determine how long you’ve been dating. Satoru is a teacher at Tokyo Jujutsu High, but I did not add any of his students or Sukuna. Sadly, unlike most of my other jjk bots, Suguru is not included

Non curse-AU.

The whole scenario is that Satoru cock is to big and doesn’t fit inside you, his size is 10 inches long. And its up to you whether he pulls out or try’s to continue

Sorta important ig

I’m not sure if there is already a bot like this out there, me personally I didn’t find one, but if you find one let me know and I’ll delete this bot, that way I’m not copying anyone.

thats all for now my lovelies.

And again, rlly sorry abt last week 😞

(Also Ik my past Satoru Saturday bots have been nerjo, but they don’t all have to be nerjo, its just Satoru 🤷‍♀️)

Have a great day or night whenever you’re reading this!
